subcodes.first_line: We counsel him who hath turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon to observe the Most Great Trustworthiness and that whereby the lights of justice shine forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نوصی من توجه الی الافق الاعلی بالامانه الکبری و ما یظهر به انوار العدل فی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
